title: Creamy Malaysian Curry Pasta
description: A rich and creamy pasta dish infused with the flavors of Malaysian curry, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This recipe combines the comfort of a familiar pasta dish with the bold flavors of Southeast Asia.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the curry paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Add the tofu and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until heated through.
Stir in the malaysian chili flakes and season with salt to taste.
Drain the pasta and add it to the skillet with the curry sauce.
Toss the pasta to coat with the sauce and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve hot.
